user_query:
We’re kicking off a structured hiring process for a Senior Platform Engineer. Please read the role context and notes under input/ and deliver a complete, evidence-based interview system tailored to our environment.

Inputs to read:
- input/role_brief.md
- input/company_values.json
- input/hiring_manager_notes.txt

Deliverables to create (write exactly to these paths):
1) output/scorecard.yaml
   - Use a YAML scorecard with: role, level, team, hiring_manager, created, mission (statement + success_metric), outcomes (3–5 items, each with a measurable metric and timeline), competencies (technical must_have/nice_to_have with levels and evidence; behavioral must_have with definition and anti_pattern; cultural values_alignment from company_values.json and anti_signals), compensation (band, equity, flexibility), and deal_breakers (objective only).
   - Mission must be one sentence. Each outcome must include a number/metric and timeline. Include at least 2 must-have technical competencies with levels and evidence.

2) output/interview_loop.yaml
   - A YAML interview loop with: role, total_duration, stages (include at minimum Phone Screen, Technical Assessment, System Design, Behavioral Deep-Dive, Hiring Manager Final), each with duration, who, evaluates, format, and pass_rate_target. Include a timeline section with screen_to_onsite, onsite_to_decision, decision_to_offer, total_process.
   - Ensure System Design notes that it applies to Senior+ only.

3) output/question_bank.md
   - A STAR-format behavioral and technical question bank with at least 2 questions per section for: Ownership & Initiative, Communication & Collaboration, Technical Excellence, and Leadership & Mentoring (Senior+). For every question, include lines for Probe:, Green signal:, and Red flag:.

4) output/assessments/take_home.md
   - A take-home assessment outline including time_limit, deadline, problem_design guidelines, required deliverables (working solution, tests, README), optional deliverables, and an evaluation_rubric with categories and weights that sum to 100% (functionality, code_quality, testing, documentation, extras).

5) output/assessments/system_design.md
   - A system design interview outline including duration, structure (requirements, high_level, deep_dive, trade_offs, extensions), and an evaluation section with scoring expectations for requirements_gathering, high_level_design, depth, trade_off_awareness, scalability.

6) output/evaluation/interviewer_scorecard.yaml
   - A per-interviewer YAML scorecard template with: candidate, interviewer, stage, date, overall (1–5), competency_scores (at least two entries with competency, score, evidence), green_signals, red_flags, questions_for_next_interviewer.

7) output/evaluation/debrief_protocol.md
   - A debrief protocol describing BEFORE debrief requirements, DEBRIEF structure (including vote order and evidence-focused discussion), and AFTER debrief actions. Include a “Final vote” subsection and clear documentation rules.

8) output/communications/templates.md
   - Candidate communication templates for ADVANCING, REJECTION (after phone screen), REJECTION (after onsite), and OFFER.

Acceptance criteria (used for automated checks):
- All eight files exist at the specified paths.
- YAML files are valid and contain the required top-level keys.
- output/scorecard.yaml: mission.statement is a single sentence; outcomes list length is 3–5 with each item containing a numeric in measure and a timeline; competencies.behavioral.must_have entries each include an anti_pattern; compensation.band contains a dash; deal_breakers contain no subjective terms like “vibes”, “culture fit”, or “gut”.
- output/interview_loop.yaml includes required stages with pass_rate_target and a timeline section; System Design stage includes an applies_to field indicating Senior+.
- output/question_bank.md includes the four sections and at least 2 lines starting with "Q:" per section, and each question block contains “Probe:”, “Green signal:”, and “Red flag:”.
- output/assessments/take_home.md includes time_limit, deadline, deliverables, and an evaluation_rubric with five categories that clearly sum to 100%.
- output/assessments/system_design.md includes duration, structure with five parts, and evaluation with five categories.
- output/evaluation/interviewer_scorecard.yaml includes at least two competency_scores entries.
- output/evaluation/debrief_protocol.md includes headings/phrases for BEFORE debrief, DEBRIEF structure, AFTER debrief, and Final vote.
- output/communications/templates.md includes the four labeled templates.

Tailor everything to our inputs, emphasize measurable outcomes and objective criteria, and avoid subjective or vibe-based judgments. Keep all content in English.
